store_description: Snap packages for the Nimbus appliance — AI agents and assistants available for side-loading before they are published to the Snap Store.

snaps.name: hermes-agent
snaps.title: Hermes AI Agent
snaps.summary: Autonomous AI agent with 60+ built-in tools and 20+ platform integrations
snaps.description:
Hermes is an autonomous AI agent that runs on your machine or server and becomes more capable over time through persistent memory and auto-generated skills.

It connects to 20+ messaging platforms (Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Teams, and more) and executes tasks using 60+ built-in tools: web browsing, browser automation, code execution, file operations, scheduled jobs, and more.

Compatible with any OpenAI-compatible LLM — locally via Lemonade, Ollama, or a Canonical inference snap (gemma4, gemma3, deepseek-r1, and others), or via cloud APIs such as OpenAI and Anthropic.

snaps.name: nullclaw
snaps.title: NullClaw
snaps.description:
NullClaw is a lightweight, local-first autonomous AI assistant — a static binary that boots in milliseconds with no runtime dependencies beyond libc. It connects to locally-running AI model servers (Lemonade, Ollama) and exposes a gateway for chat channels (Telegram, Discord, Signal, web UI) and agentic tasks such as file operations, code execution, and scheduled jobs.

On first launch the service automatically detects running Lemonade and Ollama instances and configures them as providers, with Lemonade as the preferred default. No cloud account or API key is required.

Run 'nullclaw.inference-snap' to pick a Canonical inference snap (gemma4, gemma3, deepseek-r1, and others) as the primary provider.

snaps.name: odysseus
snaps.title: Odysseus
snaps.description:
Odysseus is a privacy-focused, self-hosted AI workspace that runs entirely on your own hardware. It provides a full-featured browser UI for chat, document analysis, deep web research, calendar sync, image generation, speech-to-text, email, and more — connecting to Ollama, LM Studio, OpenAI, Anthropic, and any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

Nothing leaves your machine beyond the LLM API calls you explicitly configure. Your conversations, documents, uploaded files, and personal settings persist across snap updates.

Run 'odysseus.inference-snap' to connect a Canonical inference snap (gemma4, gemma3, deepseek-r1, and others) as the inference backend in one step.

snaps.name: openclaw
snaps.title: OpenClaw
snaps.description:
OpenClaw is a local-first AI assistant that runs entirely on your machine. It connects to your chosen AI model and reaches the outside world through chat interfaces (Discord, Telegram, Slack, web UI, and more), performing agentic tasks such as web browsing, file operations, code execution, and scheduled jobs.

Unlike cloud-based AI assistants, OpenClaw keeps your data and conversations local: nothing is sent to a third-party service beyond the API calls you explicitly configure. You choose the model, you control the keys, and your workspace files never leave your machine without your knowledge.

Supports Lemonade, Ollama, and Canonical inference snaps (gemma4, gemma3, deepseek-r1, and others) for fully offline inference — no API key required.

snaps.name: picoclaw
snaps.title: PicoClaw
snaps.summary: Tiny, fast, local-first personal AI assistant
snaps.description:
PicoClaw is an ultra-lightweight personal AI assistant — a single static Go binary small enough to run on $10 hardware with under 10 MB of RAM. It connects to any OpenAI-compatible LLM (locally via Lemonade or Ollama, or cloud providers such as OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and 30+ others) and to 19+ messaging platforms (Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp, Matrix, and more), performing agentic tasks with persistent memory and skills.

Run 'picoclaw.lemonade' to detect a running lemonade-server and pick a model from a menu — fully offline, no API key required. Or run 'picoclaw.inference-snap' to pick a Canonical inference snap (gemma4, gemma3, deepseek-r1, and others) as the provider instead.

snaps.name: zeroclaw
snaps.title: ZeroClaw
snaps.description:
ZeroClaw is a zero-config autonomous AI agent. It wraps a native binary runtime in a clean Node.js SDK and exposes an HTTP/WebSocket gateway for chat and agentic tasks (http://localhost:3000). Supports optional browser automation and multiple LLM backends via a simple TOML config file.

Run 'zeroclaw.inference-snap' to detect a Canonical inference snap (gemma4, gemma3, deepseek-r1, and others) and configure it as ZeroClaw's active provider in one step — fully offline, no API key required.
